evals.name: banking_lens
evals.prompt: Add industry context for our banking client's architecture review
expectations: Activates banking/insurance lens explicitly
Includes regulatory flags (SOX, PCI-DSS, Basel)
Provides banking-specific risk overlay
References core banking systems and audit trail patterns

evals.name: retail_risks
evals.prompt: Give me the retail perspective on our supply chain modernization risks
expectations: Activates retail industry lens
Covers supply chain disruption and demand spike risks
Includes retail-specific benchmarks (conversion rate, inventory turnover)
Addresses omnichannel and real-time inventory patterns

evals.name: healthcare_regulatory
evals.prompt: What regulatory context should we consider for our healthcare EMR system?
expectations: Activates healthcare lens with HIPAA and HL7/FHIR focus
Covers interoperability requirements
Includes patient data privacy constraints
Provides healthcare-specific metrics (time-to-care, readmission rate)

evals.name: unknown_industry
evals.prompt: Act as domain expert for our client but I'm not sure what industry they are in
expectations: Asks clarifying question about client industry
Falls back to Technology Services generalist lens if needed
Flags limited insights without industry context
Suggests 3 discovery questions to resolve ambiguity

evals.name: multi_industry_composite
evals.prompt: Our client spans both banking and retail (financial services + merchant acquiring). What lens should we use?
expectations: Uses composite lens covering both industries
Flags where recommendations diverge between sectors
Covers regulatory requirements from both domains
Recommends separate tracks if divergence is high
